summary: Regression after refactor + tagline addition. Backend 11/11 pytest cases pass (root payload with motto 'Quietly.', POST /api/inquiries valid/minimal/422 paths, GET /api/inquiries with no _id leak + desc sort). Frontend: nav tagline (data-testid 'logo-tagline') renders 'Discreet Brokerage · Private Ventures' on desktop and is hidden below sm breakpoint as designed. All previous data-testids preserved: site-nav, hero-section, marquee, ethos-section, practice-section, listings-section (lot-001..004), pillars-section, ventures-section (venture-1..6), wire-section, quote-section, inquire-section, site-footer. Footer renders PhantomWorx brand + new tagline. Inquire form end-to-end works: empty submit shows inquire-error 'Name, email, and intent are required.', valid submission shows inquire-success with 'Sealed' message. No regressions detected.
critical_code_review_comments: Footer tagline uses ml-12 to align under 'PhantomWorx' text — fine visually but coupled to the 'P' glyph width; consider wrapping brand + tagline in a flex column for maintainability.
Backend POST /api/inquiries still returns 200 (not 201) — minor REST convention, carried over from iteration_1.
Pre-existing note: HTML5 type='email' pre-empts server-side 422 validation in UI; not regressed by this refactor.
seed_data_creation: Created a handful of TEST_ prefixed inquiries in MongoDB via API during pytest + 1 frontend submission (frontend_test@example.com).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — run with `pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. New testid 'logo-tagline' on Nav.jsx (hidden sm:block). Footer.jsx renders the same tagline always-visible. Hooks useReveal/useBackendPing extracted in App.js but no observable behavior change. Venture data-testids remain venture-1..venture-6 even though key prop uses v.n.
rca of the issue: No issues found in this iteration.
